meta.title: MQ-9 Reapers are engaging UFOs/UAP with Hellfire missiles?!?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Well, we just found out that American MQ-9 Reaper drones have engaged air-to-air targets in combat operations with Hellfire missiles, and somehow, that isn’t the crazy part. The crazy part was the target — an unidentified flying object (UAP) off the coast of Yemen that not only defies explanation… but seemed to straight up tank a direct hit from a Hellfire that, for some reason, didn’t detonate on contact.
